Issues.UpdateIssue
public static final class Issues.UpdateIssue.Builder extends com.google.protobuf.GeneratedMessageV3.Builder<Issues.UpdateIssue.Builder> implements Issues.UpdateIssueOrBuilder
 Request to update an existing issue.
